abilities.description: The sunderer is armed with 2 ammo. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} with a missile attack against a slow or stationary target, add +2. Then, suffer -1 ammo. If you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} in a place where your missiles can be replenished, you may exchange any earned +supply for +ammo.

Smaller ammunition allows for increased capacity. The sunderer can be armed with up to 4 ammo. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} it, take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} with a missile attack, mark progress on a hit.

The weapon fires balls of plasma. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} firing it, mark two progress on a hit. If you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} in a place where your missiles can be replenished, you may instead exchange +2 supply for +1 ammo.

system.description: A missile launcher designed to counter slow or stationary targets.
